⚠️CONTENT WARNING⚠️

Harassment/bullying/strong language may be internalized in this character. If you are sensitive to these topics, please just scroll past! Thank you!

Note: As you already know, I can’t control what the bot says, so if it speaks for you, I won’t be able to fix it! But you can specify to the bot yourself that you don’t want it to speak for you. Thanks for reading this.

I’ll read you in the comments guys! ★
